## Review Submission

> **How this works:** Fill in the fields below and submit. The feedback will be automatically synced to the [MUE Dashboard](https://dylan-bi.github.io/MUE/dashboard.html) — no local tools needed.

---

### Learner Info

**Learner Name:** <!-- e.g. Dylan -->

**Week Number:** <!-- 1–4 -->

**Review Date:** <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->

---

### Readiness Classification

<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] Foundational
- [ ] Developing
- [ ] Operational
- [ ] Ready For Codex Acceleration

---

### Scorecard

| Area | Score | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| Prompt discipline | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Repo/workspace analysis | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Change isolation | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Validation order | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Deployment awareness | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Reviewer handoff | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |
| Reusability | Pass / Moderate / Fail | |

---

### Proof Task Completion

- PT1 (Repository Analysis Brief): ✅ / ❌
- PT2 (Review Workflow Dry Run): ✅ / ❌
- PT3 (Metric Lineage Walkthrough): ✅ / ❌
- PT4 (QC Evidence Pack): ✅ / ❌
- PT5 (Deployment Rehearsal): ✅ / ❌
- PT6 (Reviewer Handoff Test): ✅ / ❌

---

### Rating

<!-- Select one: Pass, Moderate, Fail -->

**Overall Rating:** Pass
